title: pyrus augusti
intro: Pyrus augusti is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family. It is also known as the August Pyrus or Chinese Wild Pear, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The bark, leaves, and fruit of Pyrus augusti contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Herbal preparations of Pyrus augusti are often used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and are also valued for their potential health benefits in reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health.
